Display 1
   I2C bus:             /dev/i2c-4
   DRM connector:       card1-DP-1
   Monitor:             MSI:MAG 274QRF QD:REDACTED-MSI-SERIAL

Invalid display
   I2C bus:             /dev/i2c-9
   DRM connector:       card1-eDP-1
   EDID synopsis:
      Mfg id:           BOE - BOE
      Model:            NV156FHM-N4K
   Monitor:             BOE:NV156FHM-N4K:REDACTED-BOE-SERIAL
   This is a laptop display. Laptop displays do not support DDC/CI.
